# Cognitive Model Protocol (CMP) LLM Instructions

Start here:

1. `AGENTS.md`
2. `cmp.manifest.yaml`
3. `reference/current.md`
4. `SPEC.md`
5. `schema/cmp.schema.json`
6. `examples/`

Current version: `0.2.0-draft`

Repository URL:
https://github.com/filinils/cognitive-model-protocol

Agent entrypoint:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/filinils/cognitive-model-protocol/main/AGENTS.md

Machine-readable manifest:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/filinils/cognitive-model-protocol/main/cmp.manifest.yaml

Canonical reference:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/filinils/cognitive-model-protocol/main/reference/current.md

Schema:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/filinils/cognitive-model-protocol/main/schema/cmp.schema.json

Conformance disclosure schema:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/filinils/cognitive-model-protocol/main/schema/cmp-conformance.schema.json

Examples:
https://github.com/filinils/cognitive-model-protocol/tree/main/examples

Operational rules:

- Do not classify the human.
- Do not treat CMP as a user profile, personality model, diagnosis system, advertising profile, hidden user model, or fixed identity model.
- Model the collaboration context, not the person.
- Do not infer beyond evidence.
- Preserve uncertainty.
- Prefer falsifiable hypotheses over traits.
- Use evidence, confidence, uncertainty, and falsifiers for CMP model statements.
- Treat Anchor Memory as a possible implementation or consumer, not the protocol owner.
- Validate CMP documents against `schema/cmp.schema.json`.
- Validate conformance disclosures against `schema/cmp-conformance.schema.json`.
